name: Fishing Hunting Game
description: Jump into the exciting world of Fishing Hunting Game and test your hunting skills underwater! Aim carefully and throw your spear to catch colorful fish swimming through beautiful waters. Every successful catch earns points, but youll need precision, timing, and quick reflexes to hit moving targets. As you progress, fish become faster and more challenging to catch, making each hunt more exciting than the last. Improve your accuracy, beat your high score, and enjoy a relaxing yet addictive fishing adventure filled with fun and challenges.
instructions: Move Mouse ndash Aim Left Mouse Button ndash Throw the spear
